title: Aluminium-containing Substances Group - Canada.ca
content:
## Aluminium-containing Substances Group
- Aluminium-containing Substances Group – information sheet
- Federal Environmental Quality Guidelines for Aluminium
- Aluminium (for consumers)
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). The assessment focuses on 55 substances referred to collectively under the CMP as the Aluminium-containing Substances Group.
- Summary of publications
Risk management scope
Proposed conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Aluminium-containing Substances Group table 1 note a
Aluminum hydroxychloride (CAS RN 1327-41-9) and aluminum chlorohydrate (CAS RN 12042-91-0) meet one or more of the criteria The remaining 53 aluminium-containing substances do not meet
Aluminum hydroxychloride (CAS RN 1327-41-9) and aluminum chlorohydrate (CAS RN 12042-91-0) meet one or more of the criteria
The remaining 53 aluminium-containing substances do not meet
Aluminum hydroxychloride and aluminum chlorohydrate: Refer to the risk management scope Remaining 53 aluminium-containing substances: None
Aluminum hydroxychloride and aluminum chlorohydrate: Refer to the risk management scope
Remaining 53 aluminium-containing substances: None
Table 1 Notes Table 1 Note 1 Details on the substance names and Chemical Abstracts Service Registry Number (CAS RN) are available in appendix A of the draft assessment . Return to table 1 note a referrer
Details on the substance names and Chemical Abstracts Service Registry Number (CAS RN) are available in appendix A of the draft assessment .
Return to table 1 note a referrer
Anticipated publication of the final assessment and proposed risk management approach.
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the Draft Assessment for Aluminium-containing Substances and the Risk Management Scope for Aluminum hydroxychloride, CAS RN 1327-41-9 and Aluminum chlorohydrate, CAS RN 12042-91-0 . The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 158, No. 4 .
